summary: Iteration 40: Tested TopBar UI layout changes (pill containers, grid rebalancing, + button visibility, DeploymentModel removal from Sizing tab). ALL 10 TESTS PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. Customer Name pill: data-testid='topbar-customer-name' is editable INPUT inside rounded-full pill container - PASS
2. Opportunity pill: data-testid='topbar-opportunity' is editable INPUT in pill container, positioned as sibling to Customer pill - PASS
3. Add DC: dc-name-input, dc-kw-input, dc-add-btn visible; entered 'TestDC40' with 1000 KW, pill appeared - PASS
4. Add Site: site-name-input, site-kw-input, site-add-btn visible; entered 'TestSite40' with 500 KW, pill appeared - PASS
5. + Add buttons visibility: Both dc-add-btn and site-add-btn are visible circular buttons (28x28 px) - PASS
6. Delete DC/Site: X buttons work - DC count went 1→0, Site count went 1→0 - PASS
7. Deployment toggles: All feature-* keys found (toggle-feature-nios, toggle-feature-uddi, toggle-feature-security, toggle-feature-asset, toggle-hybrid) and NIOS toggle state changes correctly - PASS
8. IP Calculator: kw-input, multiplier-up, multiplier-down, multiplier-input all visible; multiplier 2.5→3→2.5 works - PASS
9. Collapsible TopBar: Click header row collapses inputs (dc-name-input hidden), click again expands - PASS
10. Sizing tab: DeploymentModel component NOT present - no 'NIOS Only' or 'UDDI Only' cards. Shows 'Sizing Math Explained' and 'No Sites Configured' - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx grid uses inline style gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 2fr 1.4fr 1.4fr' for DC/Sites (2fr each) and Deployment/IPs (1.4fr each) - correctly implemented
Customer Name and Opportunity inputs are wrapped in rounded-full pill containers with flex items-center gap-2 - correctly positioned close together
+ Add buttons (dc-add-btn, site-add-btn) are circular h-7 w-7 with Plus icon, pinned to bottom with mt-auto - correctly visible
CustomerDetail.jsx line 570-574 shows Sizing tab only renders SizingMathHelp and TokenCalculatorSummary - DeploymentModel correctly removed
All deployment toggles use feature-* keys (feature-nios, feature-uddi, feature-security, feature-asset insights)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI layout changes verified working. Key data-testid attributes: topbar-customer-name, topbar-opportunity (both in pill containers), dc-name-input, dc-kw-input, dc-add-btn, site-name-input, site-kw-input, site-add-btn, kw-input, multiplier-up, multiplier-down, multiplier-input, toggle-feature-nios, toggle-feature-uddi, toggle-feature-security, toggle-feature-asset, toggle-hybrid, nav-sizing. DeploymentModel component removed from Sizing tab (only in TopBar now).

pill_containers.customer_name: Editable input inside rounded-full pill container
pill_containers.opportunity: Editable input inside rounded-full pill, sibling to customer pill

add_buttons.dc_add_btn: Circular 28x28px with Plus icon, visible at bottom of DC card
add_buttons.site_add_btn: Circular 28x28px with Plus icon, visible at bottom of Site card
add_buttons.pinning: mt-auto ensures buttons stay at bottom
